content.en:
More than 7,000 years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally completed the three refining void refining Dao refining, the forbidden Dao power was already very close to the real forbidden power, once the refining was to the extreme, then the Dao power of his body would be completely transformed into the forbidden power.

At that time, his Dao power was equivalent to stepping into the Extreme Dao level.

"Whew, this harvest is too big!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Although he was unable to step into the Extreme Dao level with the help of the Three Refining Void, his strength was much stronger than before.

According to his strength, he now estimated that he was comparable to the powerful Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

And once he stepped into the Extreme Dao Ancestor level at the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, his combat power would probably soar to the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level, and he would be able to easily kill an ordinary half-step Domain Ancestor at that time.

And once he stepped into the half-step domain ancestor level, it was estimated that he would immediately be comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, and even be able to raise his cultivation to the half-step domain ancestor realm of the Ten Thousand Things Realm in a short period of time.

Wow!

The Three Refining Void stopped refining and directly moved Ye Tian out.

......

Three refinements outside the void.

Ye Tian came out and saw the Wind Mountain Lord who was guarding outside, as well as many half-step domain ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you have finally come out!"

Jin Chen Daozu was shocked.

"What's wrong?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain smiled and said, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, you have been refining in the Three Refining Void for too long, and they have all come out early!"

Ye Tian immediately understood, he insisted on it for too long, shocking everyone.

Still, even if he knew it would be eye-catching, he would do it.

He didn't want to hide his strength and cause himself to lose such a big opportunity, besides, he was already very high-profile, the invincible Dao Ancestor had the strength of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, so what if he was high-profile?

"Disperse!"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain said.

In an instant, the incarnation of a half-step domain ancestor dissipated, and their ontology had already gone into retreat, where was the leisure to wait here!

"Mountain Lord, I'm leaving!"

Ye Tian also wanted the mountain lord to say goodbye.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the human world.

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

They used the Gate of the Stone Pupil to exhaust all the two chances of the Gate of the Stone Pupil, making the Gate of the Stone Pupil a waste.

But the final success was very satisfying, the Heavenly Punishment Palace Lord was promoted from the powerful Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level to the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level, but the person almost went crazy, and it took a long time to recover.

And the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master broke the shackles in one fell swoop and was promoted to the level of the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, becoming the second Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

It can be said that the strength of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has skyrocketed a lot.

While the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain were growing in strength, the Devouring Clan knew nothing, and even when a Devouring Clan was killed, they didn't react, or they didn't know.

Because the relationship between the Devourers is not very close, and it is normal for the Devourers to disappear for tens of thousands of years, it is not surprising that they have disappeared for millions of years.

The human world.

After Ye Tian stabilized his realm, he began to think about the Devouring Clan.

At present, the Devouring Clan is indeed the biggest threat to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and even the Dao Mountain Realm, and both the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain have already interrogated some of the situation of the Devouring Clan from the mouth of the invincible Dao Ancestor Level Devouring Clan, but they don't dare to investigate.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain were afraid of angering the Devouring Clan, causing the Devouring Clan to invade the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, thus causing a catastrophe.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace and the other half-step domain ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain did not dare to explore, but Ye Tian dared to investigate.

Of course, he doesn't let the ontology probe, but lets the replica body probe.

The Devouring Sect named Teng Feng that was captured before was only at the level of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and was at the same level as Ye Tian, so Ye Tian was able to copy the other party's body and enter the Devouring Clan as the other party.

So, Ye Tian asked the Wind Mountain Lord for Tengfeng's information and all the memory content.

Only when he got all the memories could he better dress up Tengfeng and not be easily discovered by the other Devouring Clans.

Although the Mountain Lord of Fengshan did not know Ye Tian's purpose, he still handed over all the memories of Tengfeng to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian absorbed Tengfeng's memories, he had a general understanding of Tengfeng's living habits and his understanding of the interior of the Devouring Clan.

A chaotic void far away from the Void Ancient Realm.

A figure tearing through the void appeared, it was Ye Tian.

He began to replicate a whole new body - the Devourer!

Wow!

In the blink of an eye, the body of the Devouring Clan Tengfeng was copied, exactly the same as the really dead Tengfeng, there would be no difference at all, the only difference was his own memory.

After the Devouring Clan's body was copied, Ye Tian was even able to grow up with this body Devouring Universe.

But Ye Tian didn't need to do this, he didn't want to become a real Devourer.

Swish!

Ye Tian controlled the Devouring Clan's body to shuttle quickly, and quickly left here and went to the Devouring Realm where the Devouring Clan was located.

The Devouring Realm is also a small realm, no weaker than the small realm where the Wind Mountain is located, and in terms of level, it is even higher.

Under normal circumstances, people from the outside world can't find the Devouring Realm at all, and only the Devouring Clan can enter the Devouring Realm, and even if other creatures discover the Devouring Realm, they can't break in.

------------

Devouring Realm.

Ye Tian came here, but after he got close to here, his body instinctively sensed the existence of the Devouring Realm.

Immediately, Ye Tian exerted the ability to devour his talent, and his body was automatically swallowed by the Devouring Realm.

This is also the only way for the Devourers to enter the Devouring Realm, which is very stealthy and convenient.

After entering the Devouring Realm, Ye Tian felt that the rules of this world were so powerful that they were even stronger than the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

After all, this place was established by the domain ancestors of the Devouring Clan, and it is normal for the rules to be strong.

For the first time, Ye Tian returned to Tengfeng's residence.

The Devouring Clan does not have any formation prohibitions, the so-called residence is the Black Palace, which is very simple, and the Devouring Clan usually lives in their own palaces and sleeps.

Not long after returning to Tengfeng's residence, Ye Tian couldn't help but come out, and he went to the only giant city of the Devouring Clan, the Devouring Boundary City!

Devouring City is a place where Devourers trade, the number of Devourers is scarce, but there are occasional transactions, and there is even a Devourer Exchange inside, where a Devourer has been guarding for a long time.

If there is no one, the Devourer will fall asleep, and when someone comes, he will wake up and do business.

Ye Tian came to this exchange in Swallowing Boundary City, and the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm who guarded the exchange, Killing Wind, woke up.
